
```{r}
#| label: preview-networks

calib <- CALIBRATION_SCHEMES$course_split$calibration

cat("DoD2k archive × proxy (v2.0):\n")
print(head(summarize_dod2k_archives("v2"), 12))

network_ids <- c("dod2k_speleothems", "dod2k_trees", "dod2k_speleo_trees", "ntrend_trees")
previews <- lapply(network_ids, function(id) {
  net <- build_proxy_network(
    id,
    calib_start = calib[1],
    calib_end = calib[2]
  )
  cbind(proxy_network_map_df(net), label = net$meta$label)
})
proxy_map_df <- do.call(rbind, previews)

knitr::kable(
  unique(proxy_map_df[, c("network", "label")]),
  caption = if (exists("cap_networks") && !is.null(cap_networks)) cap_networks else "Proxy networks"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: plot-proxy-locations
#| fig-cap: !expr 'cap_proxy_map'

plot_proxy_map(
  proxy_map_df,
  title = if (exists("title_proxy_map")) title_proxy_map else "Proxy networks"
)
```
